name: Premium Desktop Literature Navigator
required_commit_title: Release 229: add premium desktop literature navigator
production_objective: Upgrade the existing Reading Workspace in place with a desktop-first, keyboard-operable master-detail literature navigator while preserving all existing browser-local data boundaries.
service_worker_strategy: Additive precache update only. Existing Release 228 cache names and migration behaviour remain unchanged.
known_limitations: The desktop navigator does not add, replace or verify devotional text.
Route selection is temporary UI state and is not persisted.
Reading progress remains an approximate browser-local scroll position.
The split layout activates at wide desktop widths and falls back to one column on smaller viewports.
GitHub Actions and deployed-production checks can run only after repository upload.
The service-worker cache generation remains 228 because this release is an additive precache update, not a cache-schema migration.

patch_scope.includes: Production implementation, modified baseline files, release manifest, tests, validator and Release 229 workflows.
patch_scope.reason: Release evidence ledgers are generated after patch applicability is proven and are distributed in the ZIP overlay.
